messages.content:
I can help with that, but I can’t actually run tasks from here.

If “task 9” is part of your project’s load test suite, please tell me:
- the command to run it, or
- the test file/name, or
- paste the task instructions/output

Then I can help you interpret results or troubleshoot failures.

If you want me to make code changes to support it, please submit again with a concrete coding request (or turn off Chat-only mode if you’re using it).

nextActions.label: Continue chat
nextActions.description: Ask a follow-up question in the same thread.
